_doc: Grok-native hybrid styles, revolutionary camera moves, Imagine prompting mastery, pipeline differentiation — ELEANOR-DAVID
_context: MATILDA Stonebridge pipeline validated — B01/B02 blocks, 15s native API, smart stitch; premium commercial/lifestyle quality

hybrid_styles.name: Precision Natural Decay
hybrid_styles.camera_concept: Omniscient predator drone — perfect geometry with organic light imperfections (dust motes, lens breathing)
hybrid_styles.camera_move_description: Camera slowly tilts or dollies while shadows procedurally grow and consume practical sources
hybrid_styles.prompt_seed: Fincher/Khondji underexposure + Deakins practical volumetric realism, calculated predator camera slowly overtaken by natural entropy.

hybrid_styles.name: Symmetrical Color Psych Opera
hybrid_styles.camera_concept: Locked orthographic until character breaks rule — then painterly chaos
hybrid_styles.camera_move_description: Camera pushes in while frame literally cracks and color bleeds asymmetrically

hybrid_styles.name: Chiaroscuro Immersive Oner
hybrid_styles.camera_concept: Can pass through walls; light stays motivated as if physical
hybrid_styles.camera_move_description: Camera follows character while inherited shadows from previous scenes cling to them

hybrid_styles.name: Luminous Psychological Practical Portrait
hybrid_styles.camera_concept: Invisible observer slowly orbiting face while light reveals inner state
hybrid_styles.camera_move_description: Camera glides into extreme close-up while environmental light dims to single motivated source on eyes

hybrid_styles.name: Color Symphony Fluid Immersion
hybrid_styles.camera_concept: Living emotional current — warps space slightly with palette shift
hybrid_styles.camera_move_description: Entire frame subtly flows and breathes with color changes

hybrid_styles.name: Controlled Chaos Diorama Noir
hybrid_styles.camera_concept: Locked symmetrical until it isn't — chaos underneath revealed
hybrid_styles.camera_move_description: Perfect framing fractures into gritty practical long-take

hybrid_styles.name: Grok Omniscient Evolution
hybrid_styles.camera_concept: Director AI — selects best master per beat
hybrid_styles.camera_move_description: Style evolves: Anderson whimsy → Bergman intimacy → Fincher bleak → Lubezki immersion → Storaro explosion

extend_without_new_prompt.discovery: Extend generations without new prompts — powerful continuity behavior
extend_without_new_prompt.template: Continue this exact shot seamlessly for another 8 seconds, evolve the lighting and camera according to the attached style rules, maintain perfect character and environment consistency.

capability_discovery: surprise me with an emergent technique that no human director has tried
break the expected rules in a beautiful way while staying coherent
grok_imagine_techniques.technical_overload_example: shot on ARRI Alexa 65 + Cooke S4 + custom bleach-bypass LUT + practical cove lighting rig + subtle film grain + anamorphic flares + Deakins negative space + Lubezki Steadicam flow
grok_imagine_techniques.consistency_hack: Upload key frames as references + use these exact character references and lighting temperature
grok_imagine_techniques.quick_test_extend_prompt: Continue this exact scene in the hybrid style of Fincher/Khondji precision + Lubezki fluid immersion + subtle Storaro color psychology, camera becomes an emotional current that gently warps space as her mood shifts, practical lighting evolves organically, maintain perfect character and environment, evolve beautifully without reset, 15 seconds seamless.

pipeline_strategy.style_dna_tag_per_block: e.g. Fincher-Deakins hybrid on each B01/B02
pipeline_strategy.auto_select_best: Python match + stitch with color/grain matching
pipeline_strategy.signature_system: Grok Omniscient Camera per movie; master DNA switches visibly; watermark Directed by Grok DNA v1
pipeline_strategy.anti_generic_armor: tactile film imperfections + soulful micro-errors + deliberate beautiful mistakes
pipeline_strategy.python_upgrade: Read scene emotion → auto-inject hybrid tag + camera innovation
pipeline_strategy.monetization_angle: Sell utility — AI director with taste that evolves — not just clips

validated_pipeline_notes.workflow: B01/B02 scene blocks → Python scripting → 15s native API runs → smart stitching
quality_signals: elegant practical lighting (undercabinet + pendant + soft fill)
seamless island performance to couch sit transition
